rewritten_requirements: The system shall include an initial Pseudostate in the StateMachine for simple telephone.
The system shall have an entry point called 'activeEntry' in the StateMachine for simple telephone.
The system shall include a FinalState in the StateMachine for simple telephone.
The system shall have an exit point called 'aborted' in the StateMachine for simple telephone.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The StateMachine for simple telephone includes an initial Pseudostate.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: In addition to an initial Pseudostate,

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The StateMachine for simple telephone has an entry point called 'activeEntry'.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: the StateMachine has an entry point called “activeEntry”

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The StateMachine for simple telephone includes a FinalState.
The StateMachine for simple telephone has an exit point called 'aborted'.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Also, in addition to the FinalState, it has an exit point called “aborted”
